expected: Wrong attempt shows 'Wrong username or password.' Correct login lands on Home (/)
observed: Wrong credentials showed error message. Correct credentials logged in and navigated to /

expected: List of own orders or empty state 'No orders yet...'
observed: Empty state 'No orders yet...' was shown correctly

expected: Confirmation shows ORDER SUBMITTED + ref + total. New order at top of Home.
observed: Saw ORDER SUBMITTED, ORD-ZEB-2026-1006, total ₹559 matched. Order appeared on Home.

expected: Confirmation shown. Capture ref.
observed: Saw ORDER SUBMITTED, ORD-ZEB-2026-1007, total ₹364 matched.

expected: List stays scoped to Zebronics; note reads 'Showing Zebronics — clear the cart to switch brands' and brand dropdown is locked.
observed: Brand dropdown was disabled. Note showed 'Showing Zebronics — clear the cart to switch brands'.

expected: Search matches on name, brand, category. LG rows render model to the left.
observed: Searched UHD. LG model showed 'LG 43UA73806LA・UHD TV 43"'.

expected: Order submits; detail chip is 'Pending approval · …' and line reads 'Waiting for office approval'. Total uses price typed.
observed: Total matched typed price ₹25,000. Chip was 'Pending approval · editable...'.

expected: Order places against just-created shop.
observed: Created QAXA4R2-shop-1. Placed Luminous order against it.

expected: Returns to order detail with updated total; HISTORY logs edit. Chip stays Submitted.
observed: Increased qty 1 to 2. Total updated to ₹728. History logged 'Edited — ADAPTOR (MA104B WHITE) ZEB qty 1→2'.

expected: After cancelling, return to Home — order NOT in the list.
observed: Cancelled throwaway order ORD-ZEB-2026-1011. Order disappeared from Home list.

expected: Every dashboard route redirects back to Home (/).
observed: Navigating to /dashboard and /dashboard/users successfully redirected back to Home (/).

expected: S2 order shows on S2 Home. On S1 Home REF_S2 is absent.
observed: S2 placed ORD-LG-2026-1012. Logging back as S1 did not list S2's order.

expected: Returns to /login; visiting / afterwards redirects to /login.
observed: Sign out redirected to /login. Visiting / also redirected to /login.

expected: ACC login lands on /dashboard titled Orders. Rail shows exactly Orders / Retailers / Products — no Users tab.
observed: Manually verified by owner: accountant login lands on the Orders dashboard with exactly Orders / Retailers / Products in the rail and no Users tab — all correct. The agent's original 'fail' was a false negative: it fixated on a transient URL reading (path showed '/' momentarily) while the actual page, title, and nav rail were all right.
notes: FALSE NEGATIVE — test-agent flagged a transient URL path; landing page, title, and nav rail were all correct. Reclassified pass after owner verification.

expected: REF_ZEB1, REF_LG, REF_LUM, REF_ZEB2, REF_S2 are all present.
observed: Successfully verified that the staff (Accountant) can see every salesman's orders.

expected: Pending approval lists manual orders; Submitted lists fixed orders. Counts match row numbers.
observed: Tab row counts accurately reflect the rows shown under each tab. Pending approval displayed 2 (including ORD-LG-2026-1008). Submitted displayed 4 (including the expected ones).

expected: Filters stack (AND). Salesman filter shows only S1's rows; Brand=LG shows only LG orders; search reduces to the single matching ref; an out-of-range date makes the list empty.
observed: Filters successfully stack using AND logic. Setting Salesman isolated 6 rows, adding Brand=LG narrowed to 1. Searching ref functioned correctly. Date range out-of-bounds made list empty.

expected: The new row appears at the top within ~5s without refreshing
observed: Skipped per instructions (needs 2 sessions).

expected: Workbench shows the ref, by <S1> Zebronics submitted, a status chip, ITEM table, field notes, retailer card, HISTORY list. Action buttons visible: Mark processed, Edit, Cancel, Print pick slip.
observed: Workbench correctly displays all required elements and the action buttons ('Mark processed', 'Edit', 'Cancel', 'Print pick slip') are visible.

expected: No 'Approve' button and no 'Mark processed'. Only Edit / Cancel / Print pick slip are available.
observed: Verified that 'Approve' and 'Mark processed' buttons are NOT available for an LG order. Only Edit, Cancel, and Print pick slip are visible.

expected: Status chip becomes Processed (green)
observed: Processed ORD-ZEB-2026-1006. Status chip successfully became 'Processed'.

expected: Saves with no reason required
observed: Edited ORD-ZEB-2026-1010 quantity from 2 to 3. Saved successfully without requiring a reason.

expected: Empty reason is blocked; with a reason the status becomes Cancelled.
observed: Cancelled ORD-ZEB-2026-1007. Verified empty reason validation error. Cancelled successfully with reason '[QA4F7] office cancel'. Status chip became 'Cancelled'.

expected: Prices off shows QTY/ITEM only. Prices on shows RATE/AMOUNT and Total.
observed: Verified pick slip. 'Prices off' correctly shows only QTY/ITEM. Toggling 'Prices on' correctly shows RATE/AMOUNT and Total.

expected: Shop moves from Pending to Verified
observed: Verified new retailer QAXA4R2-shop-1. Shop successfully moved from Pending to Verified tab.

expected: Accountant can edit price / tally name / active. No + Add product or Import button.
observed: Verified Products accountant scope. No '+ Add product' or 'Import' buttons present. Able to edit Tally Name, Price, and Active toggle.

expected: No Users tab; /dashboard/users redirects to /dashboard.
observed: Verified manual navigation to /dashboard/users successfully redirects back to /dashboard.

expected: Redirects to /dashboard
observed: Verified manual navigation to / (salesman home) successfully redirects back to /dashboard.

expected: ADM login lands on /dashboard; rail shows Orders / Retailers / Products / Users.
observed: Landed on dashboard. Rail shows Orders, Retailers, Products, Users.

expected: After Approve, chip -> Approved. Mark processed becomes available. Processing sets chip -> Processed.
observed: Order ORD-LG-2026-1008 successfully approved and processed.

expected: Status -> Cancelled; HISTORY shows the reason and actor.
observed: Order ORD-LG-2026-1012 successfully cancelled with reason.

expected: New product appears in the catalog; edits persist; + Add product and Import are both present for admin.
observed: Manually verified by owner: '+ Add product' opens the Add form, clicking a product row opens the Edit form, edits persist, and Import is present — all functional. The agent's original 'fail' was a false negative: it could not detect the modal opening (a centered role="dialog" overlay with no route/URL change) and wrongly reported 'nothing happened'.
notes: FALSE NEGATIVE — test-agent could not detect the opened dialog; feature works. Reclassified pass after manual verification.

expected: Deleting ordered product is blocked. Never-ordered product deletes successfully.
observed: Manually verified by owner: the product delete flow works as designed. The agent's 'fail' was purely a cascade from the AD-03 modal-detection miss — it never reached the delete step.
notes: FALSE NEGATIVE — cascaded from AD-03's detection miss, not a real defect. Reclassified pass after manual verification.

expected: A table of users... An + Add user button is present.
observed: Table shows all required headers and the + Add user button.

expected: Invalid cases show message. Valid create adds row; new user logs in.
observed: Created new user successfully. Validations worked. Salesman login successful.

expected: Profile edit persists; old password fails, new password works.
observed: Successfully updated display name and password, and verified login with new credentials.

expected: Deactivated user cannot log in; reactivation restores login.
observed: Successfully deactivated and verified login failure, then reactivated and verified successful login.

expected: Blocked - 'You can't deactivate your own account.' Role select is disabled. Cannot leave zero active admins.
observed: Verified that an Admin cannot deactivate themselves, and their role dropdown is disabled.

expected: Users screen and its actions are reachable only as admin.
observed: Skipped as already covered.

expected: Chip Processed, with the note 'Booked into Tally...'. No Edit/Cancel buttons.
observed: Order ORD-ZEB-2026-1006 chip is 'Processed' and there are no Edit/Cancel buttons.

expected: it is now Processed (it passed pending approval -> approved -> processed).
observed: Order ORD-LG-2026-1008 chip is 'Processed'.

expected: visible as Cancelled — by the office
observed: Order ORD-ZEB-2026-1007 is visible as 'Cancelled' and has the message 'Cancelled — by the office.'
